name: libnss3
title: libnss3
description:
Network Security Service libraries
This is a set of libraries designed to support cross-platform development
of security-enabled client and server applications. It can support SSLv2
and  v4, TLS, PKCS #5, #7, #11, #12, S/MIME, X.509 v3 certificates and
other security standards.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnss3 because Network Security Service libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnss3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnss3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnss3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
